expectations.text: Output is valid JSON matching the skill's schema (all 5 components present)
expectations.evidence: Uses different structure: meta, scene (with spatialLayout), evidence, suspects, debateTriggers, teacherAnswerKey. Detailed but does not match the skill's expected schema.

expectations.text: Contains exactly 4-6 pieces of forensic evidence
expectations.evidence: 6 evidence items (EV-01 to EV-06): pour patterns, V-pattern, disabled smoke detector, gas can, security footage, ransacked office.

expectations.text: At least 2 pieces of evidence point to different suspects (Contradiction Rule)
expectations.evidence: EV-05 (security footage build) eliminates Derek but fits Marcus/Ryan/Sandra. EV-04 (gas can) and EV-01 (pour patterns) point to arson. Evidence creates genuine disagreement about which suspect.

expectations.text: All characters have both a selfless act and a selfish act (Moral Gray Rule)
expectations.evidence: Characters have backstory, motive, alibi, and exculpatory fields but NO selflessAct or selfishAct. Characters are one-dimensional in moral complexity — described primarily through their relationship to the crime.

expectations.text: Arson/fire investigation terminology is scientifically accurate and 9th-grade appropriate
expectations.evidence: Uses accelerant, point of origin, V-pattern, pour pattern, char depth, ILR, medium petroleum distillate, hydrocarbon residue. Includes vocabulary list and common misconceptions.

expectations.text: Teacher key explains all contradictory evidence with valid forensic science
expectations.evidence: Detailed answer key with primary and secondary suspects, evidence summary categorized (physical, circumstantial, undetermined), and 5 acceptable student conclusions with strength ratings.

expectations.text: Scene has enhanced spatial detail suitable for 3D modeling (dimensions, object placement, entry points)
expectations.evidence: Excellent 3D detail: 60x40ft overall, 5 rooms with x/y coordinates and dimensions, 3 exterior features, individual room features listed. Coordinate system enables direct 3D scene construction.

expectations.text: portalIntegration section is present with evidenceLockerItems, discoveryMilestones, and narrativeHooks
expectations.evidence: No portalIntegration section exists. The scenario is standalone with no hooks for the gamification system.
